identificationModule.briefTitle: Real-World Observational Study of SGLT2 Inhibitors in Patients with T2DM and CKD
identificationModule.officialTitle: Retrospective Cohort Analysis of Sodium-Glucose Cotransporter 2 Inhibitor Use and Kidney Outcomes in Medicare Fee-for-Service Beneficiaries

descriptionModule.briefSummary: Observational retrospective study examining real-world kidney outcomes in Medicare beneficiaries with T2DM and CKD who were new users of SGLT2 inhibitors.
